app.rdg: 1. Stab tihîlh leglis?
1. stab tiʔiɬ ləglis ?
1. what the church
1. What is the church?
Tihîlh leglis skrokro gwalh boku tsoku kretia tolal boku lilhched;
tiʔiɬ ləglis sqʼʷuʔqʼʷuʔ gʷəɬ bəkʷ cəkʷ kretia tulʼʔal bəkʼʷ liɬčəd;
the church gathering belonging-to all straight christians from all which-way
The church is a gathering of all true Christians from everywhere
sgwas halgwa lilhzihu sihusiams halgwa Shesu-Kri al di sherk;
sgʷaʔs həlgʷə liɬʤixʷ sixʷsiʔabs həlgʷə Shesu-Kri ʔal diʔ šəq;
their-own they first high+nobleman Jesus Christ in the sky
their own first leader is Jesus Christ in heaven
gula lepam lilhzihu sihusiams halgwa al ku swatihuhted.
gʷəl lepam liɬʤixʷ sixʷsiʔabs həlgʷə ʔal kʷi swatixʷtəd.
then the-pope first high+nobleman their on the earth
then the pope is their first leader on the earth
2. Shesu-Kri o ku tu hoyud lepam lilhzihu Siam?
2. Shesu-Kri ʔu kʷi tuhuyud lepam liɬʤixʷ siʔab.
2. Jesus Christ Q the past made pope first nobleman
2. Was it Jesus Christ who made the pope the first leader?
E, Shesu-Kri ku tu hoyud ku lepam lilhzibu Siam,
ʔi, Shesu-Kri kʷi tuhuyud kʷi lepam liɬʤixʷ siʔab,
yes Jesus Christ the past made pope first nobleman
Yes, it was Jesus Christ who made the pope the first leader,
gula tsidîlh Sen-Piel tu hoyil lilhizihu lepam.
gʷəl cədiɬ Sen-Piel tuhuyil liɬʤixʷ ləpam .
then it-was Saint-Peter made first pope
and it was Saint Peter who was made the first pope.
3. Tsidîlh o Shesu-Kri ku tu hoyud siam ku lesebek?
3. cədiɬ ʔu Shesu-Kri kʷi tuhuyud siʔab kʷi lesebek.
3. them Q Jesus Christ the past made nobleman the bishops
3. Was it Jesus Christ who made the bishops leaders?
E, tsidîlh Shesu-Kri tu hoyud siam ku lesebek,
ʔi, cədiɬ Shesu-Kri tuhuyud siʔab kʷi lesebek ,
yes. them Jesus Christ the past made nobleman the bishops
Yes, it was Jesus Christ who made the bishops leaders?
gwla lepam sihusiam aku lesebek;
gʷəl lepam sixʷsiʔab ʔə kʷi lesebek;
and pope highest+nobleman of the bishops
and the pope the leader of the bishops.
gula tsahadilh lesapot ku tu hoyil lilhzihu lesebek.
gʷəl caadiɬ lesapot kʷi tuhuyil liɬʤixʷ lesebek .
then those apostles the made first bishops
and the apostles made the first bishops.
4. Tsidîlh o Shesu-Kri ku tu hoyud ku leple,
4. cədiɬ ʔu Shesu-Kri kʷi tuhuyud kʷi leple,
4. Q Jesus-Christ the made the priests
Was it Jesus Christ who made the priests
dhual kwi gwa dahu haidubtobus ku atsilhtalbihu,
dxʷʔal kʷi gʷədəxʷ haydubtubus kʷi ʔaciltalbixʷ,
for the way-to know?? the people
as a way to get to know the people
eba dhual kwi gwas hoyuds halh?
ʔibə dxʷʔal kʷi gʷəshuyuds haʔɬ.
and for the do good
and to do good?
E, tsidîlh Shesu-Kri ku tu hoyud ku leple,
ʔi, cədiɬ Shesu-Kri kʷi tuhʷyud kʷi leple ,
yes Jesus-Christ the made the priests
Yes, it was Jesus Christ who made the priests
dhual kwi gwa dahu haidubtobus ku atsilhtalbihu, eba dhual kwi gwas hoyuds halh;
dxʷʔal kʷi gʷədəxʷhaydubtubus kʷi ʔaciɬtalbixʷ, ʔibə dxʷʔal kʷi gʷəshuyuds haʔɬ;
for the way-to know?? the people and for the do good
as a way to get to know the people and to do good.
gula tihîlh lepam eku lesebek sihusiams halgwa.
gʷəl tiʔiɬ lepam ʔi kʷi lesebek sixʷsiʔabs həlgʷə.
then the pope and the bishops leaders their
and the pope and the bishops are their leaders.
5. Whe o la asared gwas za'tlab aku leglis al tihîlh sogutsiebalhs?
5. xʷiʔ ʔu ləʔəsʔəx̌id gʷəsʤaƛʼab ʔə kʷi ləglis ʔal ti?iɬ sʔugʷəcyəbaɬs?
5. not Q why mistaken the church in the teachings
5. Can't it happen that the church could err in its teachings?
Whe la asared gwas za'tlab aku leglis al tihîlh sogutsiebalhs, yare tskwakred a al tsidîlh ku Sent-Ospli.
xʷiʔ ləʔəsʔəx̌id gʷəsʤaƛʼab ʔə kʷi ləglis ʔal ti?iɬ sʔugʷucəbaɬs, yəx̌i ckʼʷaqid ʔaʔ ʔal cədiɬ kʷi Sent-Ospli.
not why mistaken of the church in the teachings because always there of that the holy spirit
It can't happen that the church could err in its teachings because the Holy Spirit is always there.
6. Stab tihîlh lakomion desa?
6. stab tiʔiɬ lakomion desa.
6. what the communion of-the-saints
6. What is the communion of the saints?
Tihîlh lakomion desa sahu abietagwalh aku gwalh sele stabegus
tiʔiɬ lakomion dəsa səxʷʔabyitagʷəɬ ʔə kʷi gʷəl shəliʔ stabigʷs
the communion of-the-saints giving-each-other of the of life possession
The communion of the saints is giving each other of those possessing life
al ku tsoku kretia al ku swatihuhted
ʔal kʷi cəkʷ kretia ʔal kʷi swatixʷtəd
of the true christians in the world
of the true christians in the world
eta ba dhual ku halh skayu al di sherk,
ʔi tə bədəxʷ ʔal kʷi haʔɬ skayuʔ ʔal diʔ šəq,
and the ??? of the good dead in the heaven
eta ba dhual ta tsahadîlh askrpaleku halgwa al pikatwar.
ʔi bədəxʷ ʔal tə cəədiɬ ʔəsqəpalikʷ həlgʷəʔ ʔal pikatwar.
and the ??? their in purgatory
